name: Cochlear Limited
analysis: COH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 62% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$118.1400. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$118.0300, stop A$101.1780, target A$179.7800 (3.66:1) — then trail it.
